name: Markdown Test Plan Automation Pipeline
description: End-to-end pipeline that parses structured markdown test plans into typed ASTs, generates executable Playwright E2E tests, runs them against a live app, triages failures into 5 categories (selector/timing/content/dependency/app_bug), auto-fixes common failures, and re-runs. Includes centralized testid registry, semantic target mapping, and CLI with dry-run support.

keyFiles.purpose: Shared types: ParsedTestPlan, TestGroup, TestCase, ParsedStep, ParsedExpectation, StepAction, ExpectationType, RunOptions, RunResult, GroupResult, TestResult, TriageResult, FixResult, FailureCategory
Markdown → AST. Extracts title, ticketId, testGroups, testCases (id/steps/expectedResult/role/continuesFrom), prerequisites, signOffCriteria. Handles compound steps and role annotations.
Centralized TESTID constant with scoped sections (NAV, TASK_DIALOG, etc.) and dynamic helper functions. Single source of truth for both components and generated tests.
TARGET_TESTID_MAP (44+ entries) mapping semantic names to testid constants. resolveTestId() and generateStepCode() for producing Playwright action code.
generateExpectationCode() handling 10 expectation types: toast, visible, not_visible, disabled, enabled, text_content, redirect, color, count, attribute.
Assembles full .spec.ts files with AUTO-GENERATED header, test.describe blocks, role-specific grouping, test.describe.serial for sequential dependencies.
Pipeline orchestrator: parse → generate → writeGeneratedTest → (dry-run OR execSync playwright) → parsePlaywrightResults. Supports --group filtering in both paths.
5-category failure classifier with priority: dependency(0.95) → selector(0.7-0.9) → timing(0.7) → content(0.8-0.85) → app_bug(0.3 fallback). Uses ES2017-safe regex.
Category-specific fixes: selector→locator().first() fallback, content→text replacement, timing→waitForLoadState injection. Skips dependency and app_bug.
printSummary() with checkmark/X icons, writeJsonReport(), writeMarkdownReport() with per-group tables.
Barrel export for all public APIs

prerequisites: Structured markdown test plans in plans/ directory
data-testid attributes on interactive UI elements

steps.command: Create types.ts with ParsedTestPlan, TestGroup, TestCase, etc.
Implement parser.ts, generator.ts, runner.ts, triage.ts, auto-fix.ts, reporter.ts
